# Document

Per-document facade — text, cursor, collections.

# Document { #hwpapi.document.Document }

```python
document.Document(app)
```

Per-document façade for HWP operations.

Obtained via :attr:`hwpapi.App.doc`. Holds a reference to the
owning :class:`App`; does **not** own a COM handle.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type       | Description                                        | Default    |
|--------|------------|----------------------------------------------------|------------|
| app    | hwpapi.App | The owning :class:`~hwpapi.core.app.App` instance. | _required_ |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> app = App()
>>> doc = app.doc              # same instance on every access
>>> len(doc.fields)            # number of 누름틀 fields
0
```

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [app](#hwpapi.document.Document.app) | The owning :class:`App` — escape hatch. |
| [bookmarks](#hwpapi.document.Document.bookmarks) | Bookmark collection (책갈피). |
| [fields](#hwpapi.document.Document.fields) | Field collection (누름틀). |
| [hyperlinks](#hwpapi.document.Document.hyperlinks) | Hyperlink collection. |
| [images](#hwpapi.document.Document.images) | Image collection. |
| [paragraphs](#hwpapi.document.Document.paragraphs) | Paragraph collection (ordinal access). |
| [styles](#hwpapi.document.Document.styles) | Paragraph-style collection (minimal, see module docstring). |
| [tables](#hwpapi.document.Document.tables) | Table collection. |
